name: Bella Italia
description: Authentic Italian restaurant serving traditional pasta and risotto dishes with imported ingredients
reviews: Amazing pasta, felt like being in Rome

name: Dragon Palace
description: Dim sum and Cantonese cuisine restaurant with traditional cooking methods and fresh seafood daily

name: Sakura Sushi
description: Premium sushi restaurant featuring omakase experience and rare Japanese seafood selections
reviews: Best sushi experience in New York

name: Le Petit Café
description: Cozy French bistro serving classic dishes like coq au vin, boeuf bourguignon, and fresh seafood
reviews: Authentic French cooking at its best

name: Taco Fiesta
description: Vibrant Mexican restaurant with authentic street tacos, mole sauce, and handmade tortillas

name: Taj Mahal
description: Indian restaurant featuring traditional curries, tandoori specialties, and an extensive spice selection

name: Grill House Prime
description: Upscale steakhouse featuring dry-aged beef, prime cuts, and an award-winning wine collection
reviews: Worth every penny for special occasions

name: Garden Vegan
address: 246 Washington Square West, New York, NY 10011
description: Plant-based restaurant offering creative vegan dishes, with focus on fresh local organic produce

name: Seoul Kitchen
description: Korean BBQ and hot pot restaurant with interactive table grills and premium meat cuts
reviews: Marinated beef is tender and flavorful

name: Oasis Mediterranean
description: Mediterranean cuisine featuring Greek, Turkish, and Lebanese dishes with fresh herbs and olive oil
